title: Havyaka Convention 2026
description: Official iOS companion app for the HAA 21st Biennial Convention — deployed and live on the Apple App Store. Schedule, venue map, attendee photo gallery, and registration check-in with offline-first design.
modalSubtitle: SwiftUI · iOS 17+ · App Store · Mar – Jul 2026
overview: The official mobile app for the Havyaka Association of the Americas (HAA) 21st Biennial Convention (July 3–5, 2026 · Rosary College Prep · Aurora, Illinois). Built with SwiftUI for iPhone and published to the Apple App Store, it gives attendees a single place for the full program, venue map, convention info, shared photo gallery, and account tools — designed for use on the convention floor, in hotels, and throughout the weekend.

sections.heading: App Features
bullets: 5-tab architecture: Home (countdown & shortcuts), Schedule (4-day expandable program), Map (Apple Maps with venue/hotel/food pins), Photos (shared attendee gallery), and More (info + account)
Account & check-in: Email + 5-digit code auth linked to convention registration; profile saved locally; one-tap check-in on arrival
Photo gallery: Upload and browse attendee photos/videos via PHP API with files stored on Cloudflare R2 (10 photos, 2 videos per user; 45 MB max per file)
Offline-first: Schedule, map, and convention info work without a connection; network banner shown only on Account and Photos tabs when offline

sections.heading: Deployment
bullets: Fully built, deployed, and submitted to the Apple App Store — available for attendees to download on iPhone (iOS 17+)
Live backend on Bluehost at havyak.org/api with production auth and photo upload flows
Convention content (schedule, map pins, FAQ) bundled in ConventionModels.swift for easy updates across future events

sections.heading: Technical Stack
bullets: SwiftUI front end with custom design system (charcoal, orange, gold, cream palette; Georgia serif + system rounded typography)
PHP backend on Bluehost (auth.php, photos.php) with MySQL registration data and Cloudflare R2 for media storage
